item.title: Mother and child with poliosis, A hereditary white streak in their hair
item.dc:creator: Greatermarts

item.title: Either I am getting old early or the world is getting stupid faster. I thought I'd be in my 50s at least before I started the back in my day rants.
item.description: My Boomer complaints: 1. I don't want to download an app to eat here, or create a user name and password. I give you money, you give me pizza. 2. I don't want to pay a monthly subscription to use my printer, car seat warmer, television, ect... 3. Why do I have to tip for a service I am already paying for? Just add it to the bill if you want to charge more. 4. Pranks shouldn't be done to strangers, ever. It's not funny when one side doesn't consent. 5. Free things have disappeared, Air at gas stations, small candies at store registers, pop corn at the tire places. Some of it went away with covid and just never came back. 6. Phones and computers spying on you. I was watching bluey with my child on a DVD and the computer informed me with a pop up I could be watching this on Disney + instead. I don't do subscription services and how the heck do you know what I am watching and what streaming service I should be using instead. 7. When I buy something I should own it and be able to use it forever. It feels like theft to me that my copy of Mario maker 1 is just a paper weight now. That thing was over $60, I took care of it, but now it's garbage? They should have to give me my money back. 8. Ads in places they shouldn't be. I have to watch an ad everytime I want to open the app that I have to use for the security camera at my house. (This is a new feature it didn't have before) I already paid you money for a object, I am not going to pay you every month to do what you should already do!!!!! 9. I don't want objects that shouldn't need internet to have the ability to do so. No my light bulbs should work and not flash just because they can't connect to wifi. (Wife did this to our bedroom light so she could dim the light at night. I hate it.) 10. Bring back cashiers, went to Safeway today and they had 100% of the registers closed. Only self check out was available. I almost walked out...
item.dc:creator: researchonyourown

item.title: It’s time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
how can she resist?
i would die for juanita
usual sleepover outfit
not a big sushi guy unless it's shrimp tempura rolls (i know, not really sushi)
imgur is incredibly nice. thanks
i like her
epic family
i have no idea what that is supposed to mean
1 stop shopping
fucking jealous
is there any other kind of pool?
accurate
ok..
it's always performance art
that's 8 pictures, sir
mmm hmm
that's all for me, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: bOTTOM sHELF mEMES
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
You no longer have to wait for the posts to hit "most viral" to be notified. Now, you can be notified as soon as I post, so you can catch the memes fresh off the bottom shelf. The way god intended. https://imgur.com/gallery/UwUFvL3
Here's my #cutestcat Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) submission/deaf cat tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Good News for a change.
item.description: In 2006, Gordon Hartman observed his daughter, Morgan, wanting to play with other vacationing kids at a hotel swimming pool, but the kids were leery of Morgan and didn’t want to interact with her. Then and there, Gordon resolved to create opportunities and places where those with and without disabilities can come together for fun and a better understanding of one another. On April 10, 2010, Morgan’s Wonderland became the world’s first theme park designed with individuals with special needs in mind. In 2017, the Ultra-Accessible™ theme park opened it’s expansion, Morgan’s Inspiration Island, which was named on the 2018 “World’s Greatest Places” list by TIME Magazine. ------ Our Vision: Every day we work to provide an extraordinary place where smiles and laughter lead to wonderful memories with family members, friends, and caregivers. We want Morgan’s Wonderland to be a place where the common element of play creates an atmosphere of inclusion for those with and without disabilities while encouraging everyone to gain a greater understanding of one another. Morgan’s Wonderland is just like any other theme park except for a culture and environment that assures 100 percent enjoyment by every person entering the Welcome Center. Unfortunately, countless children and adults with special needs do not have access to facilities that enable them to enjoy outdoor recreation fully. Morgan’s Wonderland is changing that every day. https://morganswonderland.org/
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: Unsung heroes (sources in description)
item.description: The nursing home in question was referred to as the Valley Springs nursing home, but the report indicated that it has operated under multiple names, so if it still exists the name may have changed. According to the men they remained and worked around the clock (only taking short breaks) to bath/feed the residents and distribute medications as best they could while waiting for the state to arrive and take over. Eventually one of the residents started having medical complications and they were forced to call 9/11. This is what led to the authorities finally showing up to help the residents. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/valley-springs-manor-closes_n_6223160 https://www.nbcbayarea.com/news/local/castro-valley-nursing-home-shut-down-patients-abandoned/1957679/
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: A husky was lost in Kamchatka. They started looking for him using a drone and found him hanging out with bears
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Spicy!
item.description:
Eclair is an undersocial I’m working with. He is very scared but very food motivated which is an easy way in.
See the little stretch he does at the beginning of this clip? That’s a good sign. After this he hopped underneath his hammock and started eating out of his food dish, and I just rested my hand nearby and talked to him and he had fairly relaxed body language. Progress!
item.dc:creator: adrianontherocks

item.title: Meet your meat!
item.description: **FP edit** Thank you to everyone that had a civil discourse on the first vegan post of mine to not get hammered by downvote fairies. My wish? Send good thoughts to our imgurian who commented below about losing their friend to suicide recently. **To the trolls and psychopaths that commented about their enjoyment of harming animals, please seek help.
item.dc:creator: ispt3ch
